chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 118 – Arrival of Abu Ja’far Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>

text: كَانَتْ أُمِّي قَاعِدَةً عِنْدَ جِدَارٍ فَتَصَدَّعَ الْجِدَارُ وَ سَمِعْنَا هَدَّةً شَدِيدَةً فَقَالَتْ بِيَدِهَا لَا وَ حَقِّ الْمُصْطَفَى مَا أَذِنَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي السُّقُوطِ فَبَقِيَ مُعَلَّقاً فِي الْجَوِّ حَتَّى جَازَتْهُ فَتَصَدَّقَ أَبِي عَنْهَا بِمِائَةِ دِينَارٍ
قَالَ أَبُو الصَّبَّاحِ وَ ذَكَرَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) جَدَّتَهُ أُمَّ أَبِيهِ يَوْماً فَقَالَ كَانَتْ صِدِّيقَةً لَمْ تُدْرَكْ فِي آلِ الْحَسَنِ امْرَأَةٌ مِثْلُهَا.
مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ مِثْلَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Abdullah Bin Ahmad, from Salih Bin Mazeed, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Abu Al Sabbah,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> mother was seated by a wall, and the wall cracked, and we heard intense thuds (noise of the cracking). So, she<sup>asws</sup> said, ‘No, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and right of Al-Mustafa<sup>saww</sup>! Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has not Permitted you for the falling!’ So (the wall) remained hanging in the atmosphere until she allowed it (to fall). So my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> gave in charity one hundred Dinars on her<sup>asws</sup> behalf’.

Abu Al-Sabbah said, ‘And Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> mentioned his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> grandmother<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, the mother of his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> father, and he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘She<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> was truthful. No woman has been come across in the progeny of Al-Hassan<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, the like of her’.
Muhammad Bin Al-Hassan, from Abdullah Bin Ahmad – similar to it.
en.sarwar: Abu Ja‘far (a.s.) was born in the year seventy five AH. He passed away in the year one hundred fourteen at the age of fifty seven. He was buried in al-Baqi’ cemetery in Madina near the gave of his father, Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.). His mother was ’Umm ‘Abdallah daughter of al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn abu Talib, may Allah grant him and his rightly guided offspring blessings.
